calendar.title: Chris Tinney — PTO
calendar.notes: Chris Tinney OOO through May 20 — Solis and PF decisions requiring Tinney should wait or be flagged for return

bucket1.subject: RE: Pacific Fusion || Action items for today / next week preparation
bucket1.thread_subject: Pacific Fusion Action Items / Next Week Prep
bucket1.body_preview: I have added requested subs to BC. See attached for revised sublist. I would like to start understanding what the interiors breakout cost is. We have a meeting on Tuesday...
bucket1.ai_summary: Henley sent revised sublist asking Ryan to weigh in on interiors cost breakout and confirm direction before Tuesday workshops. No reply in 8 days. May 20-22 PF workshops approaching — this needs resolution before then.
bucket1.action: Weigh in on interiors cost breakout; confirm direction before May 20-22 PF workshops

bucket1.subject: FW: Project Solis CD Drawing bidder list
bucket1.thread_subject: Project Solis CD Drawing Bidder List
bucket1.body_preview: Can we indicate who is and is not prequalified with Clayco? This will be important to know as we move forward. Question — Are we really bidding out finishes at this stage?
bucket1.ai_summary: Tinney asked: flag prequalified vs non-prequalified subs on bidder list; confirm whether bidding finishes at CD stage. 8 days no reply. Tinney now on PTO through May 20 — can address on his return or send direction to Spieler.
bucket1.action: Call on prequalified flagging and finishes scope — can route to Spieler while Tinney is on PTO

bucket1.subject: RE: [External]Updated invitation: PNM & PF Syncs @ Thu May 14, 2026 9:30am - 10am (PDT)
bucket1.thread_subject: PNM & PF Syncs — Transformer Pad Design Standard
bucket1.body_preview: Please see the attached design standard for the Transformer Pad and the precast option. The relocation may be costly. Please advise how you'd like to proceed and when will construction start for the roadways mentioned.
bucket1.ai_summary: PNM attached transformer pad design standard and precast option. Warns relocation may be costly. Asking Ryan to advise on relocation approach and confirm road construction start timing. 2 days waiting. Cost impact unresolved.
bucket1.action: Advise PNM on transformer pad relocation approach; confirm road construction start timing

bucket1.subject: RE: Solis — Structural Preloading Conversation
bucket1.body_preview: Craig Streit (WGI) and Fang Fang (TT) coordinating on preloading before grade beam. Needs Ryan to confirm scope approach and sequence.
bucket1.ai_summary: PF coordinating preloading before grade beam with WGI and TT. Streit needs correct Google Meet link. Ryan must confirm preloading scope approach and sequence. 2 days waiting.
bucket1.action: Confirm preloading scope approach and sequence; coordinate with Craig Streit (WGI) and Fang Fang (TT)

bucket1.subject: RE: [EXTERNAL] Fwd: Clayco; Letter of Authorization
bucket1.body_preview: We'll also need to cover Chris Tinney.
bucket1.ai_summary: Abbott replied that LOA must also cover Chris Tinney. Ryan needs to update LOA to include Tinney and reissue with invoice. Tinney on PTO — LOA can still be issued without his involvement.
bucket1.action: Update LOA to include Tinney; reissue to Abbott with invoice

bucket1.subject: [EXTERNAL] RE: Baldwin + Clayco | PF Insurance Final Discussion - 5/6/2026
bucket1.thread_subject: Baldwin + Clayco | PF Insurance Final Discussion
bucket1.body_preview: All changes have been accepted. Added exhibit B. Please review and when you have accepted, I will get over to legal for contract inclusion. Next week I will send a concise list of what we'll need from Clayco on the OCIP marketing...
bucket1.ai_summary: Sarah sent final Exhibit B with all changes accepted. Requests Ryan's formal acceptance to route to legal. OCIP marketing checklist follows next week. Thread closes once Ryan accepts.
bucket1.action: Review Exhibit B; formally accept insurance terms so Sarah can route to legal

bucket2.subject: Re: [EXTERNAL] Pacific Fusion DS3 Structural Weekly
bucket2.body_preview: Bringing this back to the top of the lists. -Mark
bucket2.ai_summary: Ryan sent May 8: carry $3.5M, asked cost/ton on steel and cost/SF on stainless plate. No reply from TT or PF in 8 days. Follow-up not yet sent. CRITICAL — send follow-up immediately.

bucket2.subject: Re: [EXTERNAL] DS3 Infra - Leadership Discussion
bucket2.body_preview: ...into an initial progressive GMP and procure the early work scopes; with the context of the schedule based on all real inputs. I think this results in us sliding break ground...
bucket2.ai_summary: Ryan sent strategic DS3 notes to Conor on May 14: Keith's expectations, ~$50M savings breakdown, progressive GMP approach. Waiting on leadership. Note: Conor forwarded PF Owner thread May 15 evening to senior Clayco leaders — related discussion active.

bucket2.subject: Re: [EXTERNAL] Project Solis Elevation Study + Fire Protection Diagram
bucket2.thread_subject: Project Solis Elevation Study + Fire Protection
bucket2.body_preview: Thank you! Rebekah Bellum, AIA, NCARB, LEED AP BD+C Senior Architect...
bucket2.ai_summary: Ryan followed up May 15 prompting Rebekah for elevation study + fire protection next steps. Follow-up sent. Waiting on Stantec. 1 day.

bucket3.ai_summary: Active LJC/Gotion back-and-forth on BESS fire protection drawing comments. Gotion has 5 open items remaining. LJC responding. Ryan oversight only.
Active LJC/Gotion design review. Substation cable spec (MV sizing) needs Gotion confirmation — Sineng procurement dependent. Appelbaum managing. Ryan oversight only.
TT uploaded foundation plan CAD files to ACC for WGI Geopier ground improvement kick-off. Progressing per plan. Ryan oversight only.

bucket3.thread_subject: Project Sun — Invitation to Show Interest
bucket3.ai_summary: Abbott forwarded BHM's acknowledgment of Clayco's Project Sun response. Early qualification stage. FYI tracking.
Stantec put VE forecast review on hold pending scope decisions. Ryan aware. No action until hold lifted.

bucket3.thread_subject: Project Solis — R&D Setpoint Adjustment VE
bucket3.ai_summary: RTU/AHU reduction tradeoff analysis active. Renken handling. Ryan engaged May 13. Thread progressing without further Ryan input needed.

bucket3.thread_subject: Project Solis — Energy Recovery AHU-18 VE
bucket3.ai_summary: Renken forwarded AHU-18 energy recovery background. Engaging NDBS for VE ideas. Informational.
Huie OOO — auto-replies confirm unavailable pending PF workshops May 20-22. HVAC VE direction being handled by Renken/Stantec. FYI.
Accounting returning April travel expense document to Ryan and Tinney. Admin — review when time allows.
Conor forwarded PF owner dynamics thread to senior Clayco leaders (Abbott, Lienemann, Watkins, McGuire). Ryan included for awareness. No direct ask. Related to DS3 leadership discussion.
Wood forwarded internal design coord agenda with Civil/Landscape, Arch/Structure, MEPFP breakout plan. Working to meet PF deadlines for May 20-22 workshops. Informational.
Friday Ops meeting minutes + award notifications for week of 5/12. Large Clayco-wide distribution. FYI review.

bucket4.ai_summary: DocuSign COMPLETED — LJC subcontract 109160-001-001. Revised Exhibit B fully executed by all parties. Archive.
DocuSign COMPLETED — LJC subcontract 109160-001-002. Fully executed. Archive.
Tinney distributed Solis project schedule with PM activity IDs. Review for critical path alignment. Tinney on PTO through May 20.

Swanson submitted revised Solis waterproofing proposal per 100% DD drawings with updated utility trench scope, material pricing, and interior coating alternate. Subcontract agreement as basis. Needs review and scope/pricing decision before next GMP update.

bucket5.thread_subject: Talk Talk — Action Required: Availability Poll
bucket5.ai_summary: Dominic Wood (Stantec) sent scheduling poll for Talk Talk coordination call. Awaiting Ryan's availability input. Note: Huie OOO — poll likely targeting post-May 20 timeframe.

resolved_since_yesterday.thread_subject: Project Solis — Mechanical VE List Approval
resolved_since_yesterday.resolution: PF (Courtney) sent written email confirmation on May 15 at 19:34 memorializing approval of VE Items 3 (Natural Gas RTUs in lieu of CW/HW AHUs) and 22 (Eliminate Fluid Cooler). Confirmed by astrid@meyersplus.com. No further action required from Ryan.
